nasb.text: A stranger they simply will not follow, but will flee from him, because they do not know the voice of strangers.”

esv.text: A stranger they will not follow, but they will flee from him, for they do not know the voice of strangers.”

cnv.text: 牠們決不會跟隨陌生人，反而逃避他，因為不認得陌生人的聲音。”

ccb.text: 羊从不跟随陌生人，见了陌生人就逃跑，因为它们不认得陌生人的声音。”

csbs.text: 羊绝不会跟着陌生人，反而会逃避，因为不认得他的声音。”
